title: ExtraEmily under fire for alleged viewbotting after viral clip
summary_full: Twitch streamer ExtraEmily is facing allegations of viewbotting after a clip showed a "ViewBot.ai" tab on her browser. While some Reddit moderators suggested it was a redirect from another site, users remain unconvinced. Fellow streamer Mizkif expressed doubt, citing her usual viewer numbers. ExtraEmily has not yet officially responded to the controversy.
